_comment: Curated marketplace catalogue. Every entry is upserted into the plugins table on server startup (server/src/seed.rs). Submissions via POST /api/v1/marketplace/plugins override on conflict only for their publisher_uid; the seeder always owns rows whose publisher_uid is NULL.

plugins.name: Hello OpenCAD
plugins.description: A minimal example plugin — posts a welcome notification on load.
plugins.author: OpenCAD

plugins.name: Element Counter
plugins.description: Counts elements in the active document and posts a notification.
plugins.author: OpenCAD

plugins.name: Structural Grid Tool
plugins.description: Generate and manage structural grids with parametric column placement.
plugins.author: OpenCAD

plugins.name: Energy Analysis Pro
plugins.description: Run HVAC and thermal energy simulations directly in the browser.
plugins.author: OpenCAD

plugins.name: BIM Clash Detector
plugins.description: Detect and report clashes between building elements across disciplines.
plugins.author: OpenCAD
